content

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

created_at

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

extracted_info

Accessor to the related object on the forward side of a many-to-one or one-to-one (via ForwardOneToOneDescriptor subclass) relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Child.parent is a ForwardManyToOneDescriptor instance.

extracted_info_id

remarks

Accessor to the related objects manager on the reverse side of a many-to-one relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Parent.children is a ReverseManyToOneDescriptor instance.

Most of the implementation is delegated to a dynamically defined manager class built by create_forward_many_to_many_manager() defined below.

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

total_price

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

Accessor to the related object on the forward side of a many-to-one or one-to-one (via ForwardOneToOneDescriptor subclass) relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Child.parent is a ForwardManyToOneDescriptor instance.

class uploader.models.UploadedFile(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: Model

上传文件模型

exception DoesNotExist

Bases: ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned

Bases: MultipleObjectsReturned

address

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

construction_unit

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

document_count

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

extracted_infos

Accessor to the related objects manager on the reverse side of a many-to-one relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Parent.children is a ReverseManyToOneDescriptor instance.

Most of the implementation is delegated to a dynamically defined manager class built by create_forward_many_to_many_manager() defined below.

file

The descriptor for the file attribute on the model instance. Return a FieldFile when accessed so you can write code like:

>>> from myapp.models import MyModel
>>> instance = MyModel.objects.get(pk=1)
>>> instance.file.size

Assign a file object on assignment so you can do:

>>> with open('/path/to/hello.world') as f:
...     instance.file = File(f)
file_size

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

file_type

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

get_previous_by_uploaded_at(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: uploaded_at>, is_next=False, **kwargs)

uploader.models.file_upload_path(instance, filename)[source]

为上传的文件生成存储路径

uploader.tests module

uploader.urls module

uploader.utils module

uploader.utils.debug_keyword_search(text)[source]

添加一些关键字搜索来帮助调试

uploader.utils.extract_broadband_maintenance_fee(text)[source]

提取宽带维护费价格

uploader.utils.extract_broadband_service_fee(text)[source]

提取宽带服务费价格

uploader.utils.extract_fiber_info(text)[source]

提取光缆信息 - 支持多条光缆记录，返回JSON格式数据

uploader.utils.extract_info_from_word(file_path, original_name=None)[source]

从单个Word文档中提取信息

Args:

file_path (str): 文件的物理路径 original_name (str, optional): 原始上传的文件名，用于提取单号

uploader.utils.extract_info_from_zip(zip_path, original_name=None)[source]

从ZIP文件中提取Word文档内容并解析价格信息

Args:

zip_path (str): ZIP文件的物理路径 original_name (str, optional): 原始上传的ZIP文件名，用于提取单号

uploader.utils.extract_maintenance_fee(text)[source]

提取维护费（含税）合计

uploader.utils.extract_overall_total_price(text)[source]

提取总体估算价格

uploader.utils.extract_price_info(text, price_type, patterns)[source]

从文本中提取价格信息

uploader.utils.extract_terminal_fee(text)[source]

提取终端费价格

uploader.utils.extract_text_with_win32com(file_path, max_retries=3)[source]

使用win32com优化提取Word文档内容，增加重试机制和错误处理

uploader.utils.extract_total_price(text)[source]

提取总估算价格

uploader.utils.normalize_text_for_extraction(text)[source]

对文本进行归一化处理，移除所有空白字符（包括空格、制表符、换行符等）。

参数: text (str): 待处理的文本

返回: str: 归一化后的文本

uploader.utils.read_word_document(file_path)[source]

读取Word文档内容，支持多种方法

uploader.utils.verify_calculation(info)[source]

进行验算比较

uploader.views module

uploader.views.add_construction_remark(request, info_id)[source]

添加建设单备注

uploader.views.dashboard(request, file_id=None)[source]

统一的仪表盘视图，处理上传和显示结果

uploader.views.delete_construction_remark(request, remark_id)[source]

删除建设单备注

uploader.views.download_file(request, file_id)[source]

下载上传的文件

uploader.views.file_detail(request, file_id)[source]

(已弃用) 显示特定文件的详细提取结果

uploader.views.file_history(request)[source]

(已弃用) 显示历史上传记录

uploader.views.format_beijing_datetime(dt)[source]
uploader.views.get_construction_unit_from_township(township)[source]
uploader.views.get_default_construction_order_code(order_code)[source]
uploader.views.get_township_from_address(address)[source]
uploader.views.load_street_to_construction_unit_mapping()[source]
uploader.views.show_result(request)[source]

(已弃用) 显示提取结果页面

uploader.views.toggle_upload_mark(request, file_id)[source]
uploader.views.update_construction_email_sent(request, info_id)[source]
uploader.views.update_construction_order_code(request, info_id)[source]
uploader.views.update_construction_status(request, info_id)[source]

更新建设单进度状态

uploader.views.update_construction_unit(request, file_id)[source]
uploader.views.update_resource_address(request, info_id)[source]

更新资源地址

uploader.views.upload_file(request)[source]

(已弃用) 文件上传页面
